subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be the salutations of God and His glory! The sorrows that have befallen have rolled up the carpet of joy. Glory be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک سلام الله و بهائه احزان وارده بساط نشاط را برچید سبحان الله مره
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
